chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.256 of 2023 Kamran Rasheed Versus Mrs. Lala Rukh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For directions For orders as to maintainability of appeal in view of order dated 24.01.2024..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.03.2024 Mr. Hamid Idrees, Advocate for the Appellant. Dr. Raana Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant under instructions does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
